entities.name: Global Power Synergy Public Company Limited

financial.note: As the flagship power subsidiary of PTT Group, GPSC receives credit support and project pipeline synergy.
Major financier for the Glow Energy acquisition debt and long-term project loans; rising rates increase interest expense.

supply_chain.note: Natural gas is the primary feedstock for SPP/IPP plants. High fuel costs compress margins if Ft adjustments lag.
Revenue stability is secured via long-term Power Purchase Agreements (PPAs) for IPP and SPP segments.
Key industrial user for steam and electricity; performance correlates with PTTGC's refining and petro-chemical utilization rates.

competitors.note: Direct competition for IPP bidding and industrial user market share in the Eastern Economic Corridor (EEC).
Rivalry in the SPP segment for multi-tenant industrial estate customers.

macro_commodity_factors.logic: Major operating cost. Although partially pass-through via Ft, rapid spikes cause temporary margin compression.
Regulatory adjustments to electricity prices; rising Ft allows for recovery of fuel costs and margin normalization.
GPSC has significant USD-denominated debt and international project exposure; THB depreciation causes unrealized FX losses.
